stem: In radiotelephony, the call sign for a controller of aerodrome control service is__________．
explanation:
题干: 在无线电话中，机场管制服务管制员的呼号是__________。

选项:
A. 塔台
B. 地面
C. 进近
D. 控制

stem: In radiotelephony, the call sign for a controller in area control center is _________ ．
explanation:
题干: 在无线电话中，区域控制中心控制器的呼号是 _________ ．

选项:
A. 塔台
B. 地面
C. 进近
D. 控制

stem: Jet stream region is an area where the wind speed is greater than _________ m/s.
explanation:
题干: 急流区是指风速大于_________米/秒的区域。

选项:
A.80
B.20
C.30
D.15

stem: The horizontal range for large scale weather is about _________  .
explanation:
题干: 大范围天气的水平变化范围约为_________。

选项:
A. 500～5000公里
B.大 于5000km
C. 50～500公里
D. 小于50公里

stem: When the controller asks the pilot to “stand by”, he means _________．
options: A. he knows the pilot called
B. he will get back to the pilot as soon as possible
C. the controller may be talking to someone else on a different frequency
explanation:
题干: 当管制员要求飞行员“待命”时，他的意思是_________。

选项:
A. 他知道飞行员叫
B. 他会尽快回到飞行员身边
C. 控制器可能正在以不同的频率与其他人交谈
D. 上述所有全部

stem: The country indicator of civil aircraft for the People’s Republic of China is________.
explanation:
题干: 中华人民共和国民用航空器的国家指标是________。

选项:
A. A
B. B
C. W
D. Y

stem: An aircraft at 3,000ft AGL and 69 miles from a specific VHF ground station may improve reception by _________．
options: A. descending to a lower altitude
D. climbing to a higher altitude
answer: D. climbing to a higher altitude
explanation:
题干: 一架飞机距离特定 VHF 地面站 3,000 英尺，距特定 VHF 地面站 69 英里，可以将接收效果提高 _________。

选项:
A.下 降到较低的高度
B. 降低高度计设置
C. 增加音量
D. 爬到更高的高度

stem: ICAO adopted a phonetic alphabet to be used in radio transmissions in order to _________  ．
options: A. avoid misunderstanding of letters with similar sounds
B. avoid misunderstandings of letters with different sounds
C. make letters easy to pronounce
D. make letters easy to remember
answer: A. avoid misunderstanding of letters with similar sounds
explanation:
题干: 国际民航组织在无线电传输中采用了拼音字母，以便 _________ ．

选项:
A. 避免对发音相似的字母产生误解
B. 避免对不同发音的字母产生误解
C. 使字母易于发音
D. 使字母易于记忆

stem: Constant attention to correct phraseology and procedures will _________  ．
options: A. result in their use becoming automatic
B. ensure a high standard of radio transmissions
C. contribute to the safety of operations
D. bring about all of the above
answer: D. bring about all of the above
explanation:
题干: 持续关注正确的措辞和程序将__________ ．

选项:
A. 导致它们的使用变得自动化
B. 确保高标准的无线电传输
C. 有助于操作安全
D. 实现以上所有内容

stem: In radiotelephony, the altitude 8,500 is transmitted as _________  ．
explanation:
题干: 在无线电话中，高度 8,500 被传输为 _________ ．

选项:
A.八 五零零
B.八 千五百
C.八 千五百
D. 八点五 00

stem: In radiotelephony, the altitude 18,500 is transmitted as _________  ．
options: D. one eight thousand five hundred
answer: D. one eight thousand five hundred
explanation:
题干: 在无线电话中，高度 18,500 被传输为 _________ ．

选项:
A. 一八五零
B.一 万八千五百
C.一 八五百
D.一 八千五百

stem: In radiotelephony, FL390 is transmitted as _________  ．
options: A. Foxtrot Lima three nine zero
B. Flight level three hundred and ninety
C. Foxtrot Lima three hundred and ninety
D. Flight level three nine zero
answer: D. Flight level three nine zero
explanation:
题干: 在无线电话中，飞行高度层390 被传输为 _________ ．

选项:
A.狐 步利马三九零
B. 飞行高度390
C. Foxtrot 利马 390
D.飞 行高度三九零

stem: When transmitting time, 6:18 p.m. is given as _________  ．
options: A. six one eight Papa Mike
explanation:
题干: 发送时间为下午 6 点 18 分。给出为 _________ ．

选项:
A.六 一八迈克爸爸
B. 六点十八分 麦克爸爸
C. 十八十八
D. 一八一八

stem: In radio communication, 1:30 p.m. is transmitted as_________．
options: B. half past one Papa Mike
explanation:
题干: 无线电通信，下午 1:30被传送为_________．

选项:
A. 一点三十分迈克爸爸
B. 一点半 麦克爸爸
C. 一三三零
D. 十三点三十分

stem: When flying from northeast to southwest on stable warm front, the A/C will pass cloud in the sequence of __________ .
explanation:
题干: 当在稳定的暖锋上从东北向西南飞行时，空调将按 __________ 的顺序穿过云层。

选项:
A.C i-Cs-As-Ns
B. Cs-As-Ci-Ns
C.C i-Cc-Ac-Ns
D. Ns-As-Cs-Ci

stem: When transmitting time, 09:16 can be given as _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 发送时间时，09:16 可以写为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 零九一六
B. 九点十六分
C. 一六
D. A 或 C

stem: Aircraft with a flight range greater than ______ km are long-range aircraft.
explanation:
题干: 航程大于______公里的飞机为远程飞机。

选项:
A.2400
B. 3600
C. 约4800
D. 6000

stem: The most significant limitation of VHF signals is that they _______ ．
options: B. follow the cubature of the earth
D. travel only in a straight line
answer: D. travel only in a straight line
explanation:
题干: VHF 信号最重要的限制是它们 ______ 。

选项:
A.电 离层反射
B. 遵循地球的体积
C.不 能穿透云层
D. 只能直线行驶

stem: In radiotelephony, the call sign for a controller for _______ is Ground．
explanation:
题干: 在无线电话中，_______ 控制器的呼号是地面。

选项:
A.地 表运动控制
B. 机场管制
C. 停机坪控制
D. 进近控制

stem: A radio transmitter is activated when the _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 当 _______ 时，无线电发射器被激活。

选项:
A. 飞行员或管制员讲话
B. 麦克风有键控
C.设 定已开启
D.频 率选择

stem: The phrase “go ahead” means “_______”．
explanation:
题干: 短语“继续”的意思是“_______”。

选项:
A. 起飞许可
B. 继续您的消息
C.超 前飞机
D. 直行

stem: The identification markings of civil aircraft include _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 民用航空器的识别标志包括_______ ．

选项:
A. 航空公司名称
B. 航空公司标志
C. 国籍和注册标记
D. 以上所有

stem: Which statement below is not true?
options: A. Shortening the aircraft call sign reduces the amount of air time needed for further transmissions
B. The controller may not shorten the call sign of an aircraft if there are other aircraft nearby with a similar call sign
C. It is the controller who can initiate to use the shortened aircraft call sign
D. Either the pilot or controller can initiate to shorten the aircraft call sign
answer: D. Either the pilot or controller can initiate to shorten the aircraft call sign
explanation:
题干: 下面哪个说法是不正确的？

选项:
A. 缩短飞机呼号可以减少进一步传输所需的空中时间
B. 如果附近有其他具有类似呼号的飞机，管制员不得缩短该飞机的呼号
C. 管制员可以发起使用缩短的航空器呼号
D. 飞行员或管制员可以发起缩短飞机呼号

stem: A radio that combines a transmitter and receiver in one unit is called a _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 将发射器和接收器组合在一个单元中的无线电称为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 双工
B. 收发器
C.独 角兽站
D. 简单系统

stem: When establishing communications, _______ ．
options: A. the full call signs of both the aircraft and the ATC units should be used
B. the shortened call signs of both the aircraft and the ATC units should be used
C. the shortened call sign of the aircraft and the full call signs of the ATC units should be used
D. none of the above is correct
answer: A. the full call signs of both the aircraft and the ATC units should be used
explanation:
题干: 建立通讯时，_______ ．

选项:
A. 应使用飞机和 ATC 单位的完整呼号
B. 应使用飞机和 ATC 单位的缩写呼号
C. 应使用飞机的缩写呼号和 ATC 单位的完整呼号
D.以 上都不正确

stem: If, at any time, the pilot is given an instruction that is beyond his airplane's capabilities or is not safe to follow, which of the following practices is not right?
options: A. The pilot should inform the controller that he is unable to follow the controller's directions
B. The controller should amend his clearance for the pilot
C. The pilot should comply with the controller's instructions without reservation
D. The pilot will check with the controller for a new instruction that the aircraft can comply with
answer: C. The pilot should comply with the controller's instructions without reservation
explanation:
题干: 如果在任何时候，飞行员收到的指令超出了其飞机的能力或不安全地遵循，则以下哪种做法是不正确的？

选项:
A. 飞行员应通知管制员他无法遵循管制员的指示
B. 管制员应修改其对飞行员的许可
C.飞 行员应毫无保留地服从管制员的指示
D. 飞行员将与管制员核实飞机可以遵守的新指令

stem: That aircraft fly wrong routes or change routes without authorization is _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 飞机飞错航线或擅自变更航线是_______ ．

选项:
A. 严重飞行事故
B. 一般飞行事故
C. 飞行事件
D. 严重过失

stem: Which of the following is not a correct procedure?
options: A. Controllers should pass a clearance slowly and clearly to avoid wasteful repetition
B. A route clearance should be passed to an aircraft before start up
C. Controllers should avoid issuing a clearance to a pilot occupied in taxiing maneuvers
D. On specific occasions, a clearance may be passed to a pilot engaged in line-up or takeoff maneuvers
answer: D. On specific occasions, a clearance may be passed to a pilot engaged in line-up or takeoff maneuvers
explanation:
题干: 以下哪项不是正确的程序？

选项:
A. 管制员应缓慢而清晰地通过许可，以避免重复浪费
B. 启动前应向飞机传递航线许可
C. 管制员应避免向正在进行滑行操作的飞行员发出许可
D. 在特定情况下，可以将许可传递给进行列队或起飞操作的飞行员

stem: When an error is made in a transmission, “_______” shall be spoken, the last correct group or phrase repeated and then the correct version transmitted．
explanation:
题干: 当传输出现错误时，应说出“_______”，重复最后正确的组或短语，然后传输正确的版本。

选项:
A. 更正
B.更 正，我再说一遍
C. 不，我错了
D. 阴性

stem: Code 7500 alerts ATC that _______ ．
options: A. an aircraft has been hijacked
B. the failure of two-way radio communications has been encountered
D. false alarms have been sent out
answer: A. an aircraft has been hijacked
explanation:
题干: 代码 7500 提醒 ATC _______ ．

选项:
A. 飞机被劫持
B. 遇到双向无线电通讯失败的情况
C. 存在紧急情况
D. 误报已发出

stem: In radio check, “I read you five” means _______ ．
options: A. your signal is very weak
C. your transmission is perfectly clear and understandable
D. your transmission is reasonably clear
answer: C. your transmission is perfectly clear and understandable
explanation:
题干: 在广播检查中，“我读了你五个”的意思是 _______ ．

选项:
A.你 的信号很弱
B.我 听不到你说话
C. 您的传输非常清晰易懂
D. 你的传输相当清晰

stem: The pilot should terminate the readback by _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 飞行员应通过 _______ 终止复读。

选项:
A. 飞机的呼号
B. ATC 呼号
C. “出”字
D. “过”字

stem: If an aircraft’s readback of a clearance or instruction is wrong, the controller shall transmit “_______” followed by the correct version．
explanation:
题干: 如果飞机读回的许可或指令有误，管制员应发送“_______”，然后发送正确的版本。

选项:
A. 更正
B.更 正，我再说一遍
C.不，再试一次
D. 阴性

stem: Which statement below is not true?
options: A. The phrase “take off” is used only in takeoff clearance or in cancellation of takeoff clearance
B. An ATC route clearance serves as an authorization for line-up or takeoff maneuvers
C. The word “departure” or “airborne” is used in instructions other than takeoff clearances
D. The phrase “take off “is not used in an ATC route clearance
answer: B. An ATC route clearance serves as an authorization for line-up or takeoff maneuvers
explanation:
题干: 下面哪个说法是不正确的？

选项:
A. “起飞”一词仅在起飞许可或取消起飞许可时使用
B. ATC 航线许可可作为列队或起飞操作的授权
C. “出发”或“机载”一词用于起飞许可以外的指令中
D. ATC 航线许可中不使用“起飞”一词

stem: If a correction can best be made by repeating the entire message, the operator shall use the phrase “_______” before transmitting the message a second time．
options: C. Sorry, I made a mistake
explanation:
题干: 如果通过重复整个消息可以最好地进行更正，则操作员应在第二次发送消息之前使用短语“_______”。

选项:
A. 更正
B.更 正，我再说一遍
C. 对不起，我犯了一个错误
D.对 不起，我再说一遍

stem: The phrase “if not possible, advise” may be used together with the clearance or instruction _______ ．
options: A. when the controller is in doubt about the capability of the pilot in complying with the clearance or instruction
B. after an alternative clearance or instruction is offered
C. if the controller is sure that the pilot cannot comply with the clearance or instruction
D. when the controller is not ready to help the pilot
answer: A. when the controller is in doubt about the capability of the pilot in complying with the clearance or instruction
explanation:
题干: 短语“如果不可能，建议”可以与许可或指示一起使用 _______ ．

选项:
A. 当管制员对飞行员遵守许可或指令的能力有疑问时
B. 提供替代许可或指示后
C. 如果管制员确定飞行员不能遵守许可或指令
D. 当管制员没有准备好帮助飞行员时

stem: The phrase “unable to comply” is used _______ ．
options: A. by the controller before he amends the clearance or instruction
B. by the pilot to advise the controller he cannot carry out the clearance or instruction received
C. by the pilot before he takes action on the clearance or instruction received
D. by the controller to inform that he cannot comply with the pilot’s requirement
answer: B. by the pilot to advise the controller he cannot carry out the clearance or instruction received
explanation:
题干: 使用短语“无法遵守”______。

选项:
A. 由管制员在修改许可或指令之前
B. 飞行员通知管制员他无法执行收到的许可或指令
C. 飞行员根据收到的许可或指令采取行动之前
D. 由管制员通知他不能遵守飞行员的要求

stem: Readback procedure is not a necessity for_______.
options: A. maneuvers related to the runway-in-use
C. level instructions, altimeter settings and SSR codes
explanation:
题干: 回读程序对于_______来说不是必需的。

选项:
A. 与使用中跑道相关的机动
B. 航向和速度指示
C. 水平仪指令、高度计设置和二次雷达代码
D.风 向和风速

stem: Which of the following is not a purpose for the establishment of standard phraseology in RTF communication?
options: A. To ensure uniformity in radio transmissions
B. To detail phraseology suitable for every situation
C. To minimize ambiguity in radio transmissions
D. To cite some examples for the application of standard phrases
answer: B. To detail phraseology suitable for every situation
explanation:
题干: 以下哪项不是建立 RTF 通信标准用语的目的？

选项:
A. 确保无线电传输的一致性
B. 详细说明适合各种情况的措辞
C. 尽量减少无线电传输中的歧义
D. 举一些标准短语应用的例子

stem: Which of the following situation for which ATC is responsible is not an ATC accident?
options: D. A/C with no controller monitoring
answer: D. A/C with no controller monitoring
explanation:
题干: ATC 负责的下列哪种情况不属于 ATC 事故？

选项:
A. 类飞行事故
B. 由于分离不当造成的漏气
C.空 调迫降
D. 无控制器监控的 A/C

stem: The sequence of aircraft position report en-route should be _______ ．
options: A. aircraft call sign, position, time, level
B. aircraft call sign, present position and time, level, ETO next position
C. aircraft call sign, position, level, ETO next position
D. aircraft call sign, present time, level
answer: B. aircraft call sign, present position and time, level, ETO next position
explanation:
题干: 航路中飞机位置报告的顺序应为_______ ．

选项:
A. 飞机呼号、​​位置、时间、高度层
B. 飞机呼号、​​当前位置和时间、高度层、ETO 下一个位置
C. 飞机呼号、​​位置、高度层、ETO 下一个位置
D. 飞机呼号、​​当前时间、高度层

stem: Which of the following is not true for ATIS?
options: A. It is prerecorded and broadcast on the pilot’s request
B. It is prerecorded and broadcast on its own frequency
C. It includes routine, non-routine information usually available in an airport advisory
D. At the larger airports, there may be different ATIS frequencies for departing and arriving aircraft
answer: A. It is prerecorded and broadcast on the pilot’s request
explanation:
题干: 以下哪项对于 自动终端信息服务 来说不正确？

选项:
A. 根据飞行员的要求预先录制并播放
B. 预先录制并在自己的频率上播放
C. 它包括通常在机场咨询中提供的常规、非常规信息
D. 在较大的机场，出发和到达飞机可能有不同的 自动终端信息服务 频率

stem: Before lining up, the pilot should switch to tower control _______ ．
options: A. when instructed by the ground control
B. before lining up on the runway
C. after lining up on the runway
answer: A. when instructed by the ground control
explanation:
题干: 在排队之前，飞行员应该切换到塔台控制 _______ ．

选项:
A. 当地面控制人员指示时
B. 在跑道上排队之前
C. 在跑道上排队后
D.离 开滑行道时

stem: At aerodrome with separate Ground and Tower, the aircraft are usually transferred to Tower _______ ．
options: B. on lining up on the runway
C. at or approaching the holding point
answer: C. at or approaching the holding point
explanation:
题干: 在地面和塔台分开的机场，飞机通常会转移到塔台 _______ ．

选项:
A.离 开滑行道时
B. 在跑道上排队
C. 处于或接近等待点
D. 根据飞行员的要求

stem: Before contacting ground control, the pilot usually listens to a recording which includes current airport weather and other information. This information service is often referred to as _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 在联系地面控制之前，飞行员通常会收听包含当前机场天气和其他信息的录音。这种信息服务通常被称为_______ ．

选项:
A. 天气预报
B.出 发信息广播
C.终 端信息服务
D.自 动终端信息服务

stem: During which phase of flight is it not necessary for the controllers to restrain themselves from transmitting to the pilots?
options: D. The last part of final approach
explanation:
题干: 在飞行的哪个阶段，管制员不需要限制自己向飞行员传输信息？

选项:
A. 起飞
B. 滑行
C. 着陆滑跑
D. 最终进近的最后部分

stem: ATIS is broadcast continuously and updated _______ ．
options: A. whenever any official weather is received, regardless of content change
C. whenever the pilot or controller requests
explanation:
题干: 自动终端信息服务 持续广播并更新_______ ．

选项:
A. 每当收到任何官方天气时，无论内容如何变化
B. 每当机场条件发生变化时
C. 每当飞行员或管制员要求时
D. A 和 B

stem: ATIS broadcasts are sequenced by _______ ．
options: A. successive letters from the alphabet
answer: A. successive letters from the alphabet
explanation:
题干: 自动终端信息服务 广播按 _______ 排序。

选项:
A. 字母表中的连续字母
B. 阿拉伯数字
C. 罗马数字
D. A 或 B

stem: A departure clearance will not include _______ ．
options: B. a heading and an altitude
explanation:
题干: 出境许可不包括 _______ ．

选项:
A. 目的地机场名称
B. 航向和高度
C.应 答器代码
D.塔 台频

stem: After obtaining a departure clearance, the pilot usually will call the _______ for taxi instruction．
explanation:
题干: 获得离场许可后，飞行员通常会致电_______寻求滑行指令。

选项:
A. 接地
B. 塔台
C. 三、出发
D. 进近

stem: Which of the following will not be a common reaction by the pilot after obtaining a clearance to “taxi to” the assigned takeoff runway?
options: A. He can cross any runways except the active runway that may intersect his taxi route
B. He can directly taxi onto the departure runway
C. He should stop at the hold lines of any active runway that is on the taxi route
D. He should stop at the hold lines of his assigned departure runway, check for traffic, and continue only after cleared to do so
answer: B. He can directly taxi onto the departure runway
explanation:
题干: 在获得“滑行”到指定起飞跑道的许可后，以下哪项不是飞行员的常见反应？

选项:
A. 他可以穿越任何跑道，除了可能与他的滑行路线相交的活动跑道之外
B. 他可以直接滑行到起飞跑道
C. 他应该停在滑行路线上任何可用跑道的等待线处
D. 他应该停在指定的离场跑道的等待线处，检查交通情况，只有在获得许可后才能继续

stem: The term “radar contact” _______ ．
options: B. is used by the pilot
C. means the aircraft has been radar identified
explanation:
题干: 术语“雷达接触” _______ ．

选项:
A.由 ATC使用
B.由 飞行员使用
C. 表示飞机已被雷达识别
D. A 和 C

stem: _______ is the ATC function that provides separation and sequencing of inbound aircraft. It also provides traffic advisories or safety alerts when necessary．
explanation:
题干: _______ 是 ATC 功能，提供进场飞机的分离和排序。它还在必要时提供交通建议或安全警报。

选项:
A. 停机坪控制
B. 接近控制1
C. 机场管制
D. 区域控制中心

stem: After providing a transponder code, the approach control may ask the pilot “squawk ident”. This means _______ ．
options: A. the radar identification process has been finished
B. the pilot should operate the transponder on specified code in Mode A
C. the pilot should press the IDENT feature of his transponder momentarily and re1ease it
D. the pilot should activate Mode C
answer: C. the pilot should press the IDENT feature of his transponder momentarily and re1ease it
explanation:
题干: 提供应答器代码后，进近控制装置可能会询问飞行员“应答机识别”。这意味着 _______ 。

选项:
A. 雷达识别过程已完成
B. 飞行员应在模式 A 下按指定代码操作应答器
C. 飞行员应立即按下应答器的 IDENT 功能，然后松开
D. 飞行员应激活模式 C

stem: On initial contact, ATC will routinely provide the pilot with wind, runway, and altimeter information unless _______ ．
options: A. the ATIS has been updated
C. the pilot does require the information
D. the pilot indicates he has received the ATIS
answer: D. the pilot indicates he has received the ATIS
explanation:
题干: 初次联系时，ATC 将例行公事地向飞行员提供风、跑道和高度计信息，除非 _______ ．

选项:
A. TIS 已更新
B. 天气好
C. 飞行员确实需要这些信息
D. 飞行员表示他已收到 自动终端信息服务

stem: Where no ATIS is provided, the pilot usually asks for current aerodrome information _______ ．
options: C. after taxiing out for the departure runway
D. when the controller is not busy
explanation:
题干: 如果没有提供 自动终端信息服务，飞行员通常会询问当前机场信息 _______ ．

选项:
A. 请求启动之前
B.请 求启动后
C. 滑出跑道后
D.当 控制器不忙时

stem: Taxi instructions issued by a controller will always contain _______ ．
options: B. the holding point of the active runway
D. either A or B, whichever is appropriate
answer: D. either A or B, whichever is appropriate
explanation:
题干: 管制员发出的出租车指令将始终包含 _______ ．

选项:
A. 间隙限制
B. 有效跑道的等待点
C.现 用跑道号
D. A 或 B，以合适者为准

stem: Where all aircraft acknowledge receipt of the ATIS broadcast, the controller does not need to pass _______ to the pilot when giving taxi instructions．
options: C. traffic information in the maneuvering area
explanation:
题干: 如果所有飞机均确认收到 自动终端信息服务 广播，则管制员在发出滑行指令时无需将 _______ 传递给飞行员。

选项:
A. 间隙限制
B. 出发信息
C. 机动区域交通信息
D. 以上所有

stem: When several runways are in use and there is any possibility that the pilot may be confused as to which one to use, the _______ should be stated in the takeoff clearance．
explanation:
题干: 当使用多条跑道并且飞行员有可能混淆使用哪一条跑道时，应在起飞许可中注明_______。

选项:
A.跑 道方向
B. 风向
C.跑 道号
D. 出发信息

stem: Some aircraft may be required to carry out _______ prior to departure and are not always ready for takeoff when reaching the holding point．
explanation:
题干: 有些飞机可能需要在起飞前进行_______，并且在到达等待点时并不总是准备好起飞。

选项:
A. 飞行前检查
B. 出租车须知
C. 立场报告
D.出 发信息记录

stem: It is important to ensure that the phraseology employed during the taxi maneuvers cannot be interpreted as a takeoff clearance since _______ ．
options: A. misunderstandings in the granting and acknowledgement of takeoff clearances can result in serious consequences
B. takeoff clearance, usually cannot be delayed
C. taxi maneuvers should be done before a takeoff clearance is issued
D. the pilot is always ready for any important clearances and no mistakes will be made
answer: A. misunderstandings in the granting and acknowledgement of takeoff clearances can result in serious consequences
explanation:
题干: 重要的是要确保滑行操作期间使用的措辞不能被解释为起飞许可，因为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 授予和确认起飞许可时的误解可能导致严重后果
B. 起飞许可，通常不能延迟
C. 应在发出起飞许可之前进行滑行操作
D. 飞行员随时准备好接受任何重要的许可，并且不会犯任何错误

stem: It is occasionally necessary to cancel the takeoff clearance due to _______ ．
options: B. a departing aircraft delayed on the active runway
explanation:
题干: 有时由于_______而需要取消起飞许可。

选项:
A. 意外的交通发展
B. 起飞机在活动跑道上延误
C.即 将到来的着陆交通
D. 上面列出的任何条件

stem: An aircraft should be handed over from one ACC to another _______minutes before it flies over the hand-over point.
explanation:
题干: 一架飞机应在飞越交接点之前 ______ 分钟从一个帐户移交给另一个帐户。

选项:
A.3
B.5
C.7
D.10

stem: In order to save taxiing time for training purpose pilots may request to make a “touch and go”, which means the aircraft _______ ．
options: A. takes off again without actually landing
B. lands, stops and takes off again
C. lands, continues rolling and takes off after a short stop
D. lands, continues rolling and takes off without coming to a stop
answer: D. lands, continues rolling and takes off without coming to a stop
explanation:
题干: 为了节省训练目的滑行时间，飞行员可能会要求进行“一触即走”，这意味着飞机 _______ ．

选项:
A.再 次起飞但没有实际着陆
B. 着陆、停止并再次起飞
C. 着陆，继续滚动，短暂停留后起飞
D. 着陆，继续滚动并起飞，不停顿

stem: In the case that the missed approach is initiated by the pilot, “_______” shall be transmitted．
explanation:
题干: 如果复飞是由飞行员发起的，则应发送“_______”。

选项:
A. 复飞
B. 四处走动
C. 进近失败
D. 复飞开始

stem: After landing, the pilot should switch to ground control _______ ．
options: A. when instructed by the tower
answer: A. when instructed by the tower
explanation:
题干: 着陆后，飞行员应切换至地面控制_______ ．

选项:
A. 当塔台指示时
B. 离开跑道前
C.离 开跑道时
D.离 开滑行道时

stem: The controller will normally issue taxi instructions to the pilot _______ ．
options: B. as soon as the aircraft touches down
C. when the landing roll is completed
D. only when the pilot requests
answer: C. when the landing roll is completed
explanation:
题干: 管制员通常会向飞行员发出滑行指令 _______ ．

选项:
A. 飞机降落前
B. 飞机一落地
C. 着陆滑跑完成时
D. 仅当飞行员要求时

stem: When the controller wants to ensure the validity of the Mode C altitude readout, he may say “_______ at 7,500”.
explanation:
题干: 当管制员想要确保 C 模式高度读数的有效性时，他可能会说“_______ at 7,500”。

选项:
A. 验证
B. 确保
C. 检查
D. 识别

stem: Which of the following is not a usual method to establish the radar identification?
options: A. Requesting the aircraft to make turns
B. Requesting the aircraft to resume own navigation
C. The use of bearing and distance information from a prominent object or radio aid
answer: B. Requesting the aircraft to resume own navigation
explanation:
题干: 以下哪项不是建立雷达识别的常用进近？

选项:
A. 请求飞机转弯
B. 请求航空器恢复自主导航
C. 使用来自突出物体或无线电设备的方位和距离信息
D.二 次雷达的使用

stem: To identify an aircraft by turning before providing radar service, the turning angle should be greater than _______.
explanation:
题干: 要在提供雷达服务之前通过转弯识别飞机，转弯角度应大于_______。

选项:
A. 10°
B. 20°
C. 摄氏30°
D.40°

stem: A clearance to taxi to the active runway means a pilot has been given permission to taxi _______ ．
options: A. to the active runway for takeoff
B. via taxiways and across intersecting runways to, but not on, the active runway
C. to and hold in takeoff position on the active runway
D. on taxiways to the active runway without crossing any intersecting runways
answer: B. via taxiways and across intersecting runways to, but not on, the active runway
explanation:
题干: 滑行至当前跑道的许可意味着飞行员已获得滑行 _______ 的许可。

选项:
A. 到现用跑道起飞
B. 通过滑行道并穿过相交跑道到达但不在使用中的跑道上
C. 到达并保持在使用跑道上的起飞位置
D. 在滑行道上到达现用跑道，但不跨越任何相交跑道

stem: Which of the following is not true as concerns airport surveillance radar (ASR)?
options: A. It is designed to provide relatively short-range coverage in the airport vicinity
B. Its purpose is to serve as an expeditious means of handling terminal area traffic
C. It can never be used as an instrument approach aid
D. The ASR facilities are commonly called approach and departure control
answer: C. It can never be used as an instrument approach aid
explanation:
题干: 关于机场监视雷达 (ASR)，以下哪项不正确？

选项:
A. 其设计目的是在机场附近提供相对短距离的覆盖
B. 其目的是作为处理航站区交通的快捷手段
C. 它永远不能用作仪表进场辅助设备
D. ASR 设施通常称为进近和离场控制

stem: Which of the following statement is not true?
options: A. Flight safety is an important factor in the introduction of readback procedures
B. The readback procedures can hardly ensure an understanding in the transmission and receipt of ATC clearances and instructions
C. Readback procedures serve as a cross-check for the accuracy and correctness of the transmission and receipt of ATC clearance and instructions
D. Strict adherence to readback procedures serves as a check that the single appropriate aircraft will take action on the clearance
answer: B. The readback procedures can hardly ensure an understanding in the transmission and receipt of ATC clearances and instructions
explanation:
题干: 以下哪项陈述是不正确的？

选项:
A. 飞行安全是引入回读程序的重要因素
B. 回读程序很难确保对 ATC 许可和指令的传输和接收的理解
C. 回读程序可交叉检查 ATC 许可和指令的传输和接收的准确性和正确性
D. 严格遵守回读程序可以检查单一适当的飞机是否会对许可采取行动

stem: Code _______ is used after the failure of two-way radio communications．
explanation:
题干: 代码_______在双向无线电通信失败后使用。

选项:
A.7400
B. 7500
C.7600
D.7700

stem: The _______ situation is a condition of being threatened by serious and/or imminent danger and of requiring immediate assistance.
explanation:
题干: _______ 情况是指受到严重和/或迫在眉睫的危险的威胁并需要立即援助的情况。

选项:
A. 不安全
B. 危险
C. 遇险
D. 紧迫性

stem: If the pilot believes that his radio has failed, what is the proper procedure he will use to inform the controller of the situation?
options: A. To set the transponder to 7700 for one minute
B. To set the transponder to 7600 for one minute
C. To make a Mayday call on the radio
D. To set the transponder to 7700 for one minute and then change it to 7600 for 15 minutes or until landing
answer: D. To set the transponder to 7700 for one minute and then change it to 7600 for 15 minutes or until landing
explanation:
题干: 如果飞行员认为他的无线电发生故障，他将使用什么正确程序将情况通知管制员？

选项:
A.将 应答器设置为7700一分钟
B.将 应答器设置为7600一分钟
C. 通过收音机拨打求救电话
D. 将应答器设置为 7700 1 分钟，然后更改为 7600 15 分钟或直至着陆

stem: Generally, the aircraft holding time in the holding area should not exceed _____minutes.
explanation:
题干: 一般情况下，飞机在等待区域的等待时间不应超过_____分钟。

选项:
A.20
B.30
C.45
D.60

stem: The controller can control the aircraft in one-way or two-way radio failure by using light signals. If this is the case, the pilot will look for _______ for the clearance to land．
explanation:
题干: 控制器可以通过光信号控制飞行器单向或双向无线电故障。如果是这种情况，飞行员将寻找 _______ 以获得着陆许可。

选项:
A. 绿色常亮
B. 绿灯闪烁
C. 闪烁白光
D. 红绿交替

stem: If the aircraft in radio failure receives light signals provided by the controller during daytime, he should acknowledge tower transmission or light signals by _______ ．
options: B. blinking the landing light or navigation lights
C. rocking the wings first and then blinking the landing light
explanation:
题干: 如果无线电故障的飞机在白天接收到管制员提供的光信号，他应该通过_______确认塔台传输或光信号。

选项:
A. 摇动翅膀
B. 闪烁着陆灯或导航灯
C. 先摇动机翼，然后闪烁着陆灯
D. 闪烁导航灯

stem: One of the ways the pilot can be identified easily on radar when in distress is _______ ．
options: A. to make a Mayday call on the radio
B. to transmit the letters SOS
C. to change the transponder code to 7700
D. to change the transponder code to 7600
answer: C. to change the transponder code to 7700
explanation:
题干: 当遇险时，雷达可以轻松识别飞行员的进近之一是 _______ 。

选项:
A. 通过收音机拨打求救电话
B. 发送字母 SOS
C.将 应答器代码更改为7700
D.将 应答器代码更改为7600

stem: Code 7700 is used for _______ ．
options: B. the failure of two-way radio communications
D. the failure of minor aircraft system
explanation:
题干: 代码 7700 用于_______ ．

选项:
A. 紧急情况
B.双 向无线电通讯故障
C. 劫持
D.小 型飞机系统故障

stem: The _______ situation is a condition of being concerned about safety and of requiring timely, but not immediate, assistance.
explanation:
题干: _______ 情况是担心安全并需要及时（但不是立即）援助的情况。

选项:
A. 紧迫性
B. 苦恼
C. 不安全
D. 危险的

stem: The priority indicator for FPL is_____.
explanation:
题干: 飞行计划 的优先级指标是_____。

选项:
A.S S
B. DD
C. Q.FF
D.G G

stem: At night the aircraft in radio failure can acknowledge tower transmission or light signals by _______ to indicate that the pilot understands the light signals and will comply accordingly.
explanation:
题干: 夜间，无线电发生故障的飞机可以通过_______确认塔台传输或光信号，以表明飞行员理解光信号并将相应地遵守。

选项:
A. 摇动翅膀
B. 闪烁着陆灯
C. 闪烁导航灯
D. B 或 C

stem: The ELT, an electronic, battery-operated transmitter, sends forth a distinctive _______ on 121.5 MHz.
explanation:
题干: 应急定位发射器 是一种电池供电的电子发射器，在 121.5 MHz 上发出独特的 _______ 信号。

选项:
A. 音频提示音
B. 求救电话
C. 报警
D. A 或 B

stem: The word “Mayday” spoken at the start of a transmission identifies _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 传输开始时说出的“遇险信号”一词表明 _______ ．

选项:
A.寻 求帮助
B. 求救信息
C. 紧急消息
D. 无线电故障

stem: The word “Panpan”, spoken at the start of a transmission indentifies _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 传输开始时所说的“盼盼”一词表示 _______ ．

选项:
A. 无线电故障
B. 求救信息
C. 紧急消息
D. 火灾报警器

stem: The category symbol for flight forecast is _______.
explanation:
题干: 航班预报的类别符号是_______。

选项:
A. PLN
B. 科尔
C.飞 行计划
D. 显像管

stem: Urgency messages have _______ over all transmissions except distress messages.
explanation:
题干: 除遇险消息外，紧急消息对所有传输都具有 _______ 作用。

选项:
A. 优先级
B. 患病率
C. 特权
D. 隐私

stem: The controller may direct the pilot of the aircraft in distress to “squawk Mayday”. If this is the case, the pilot should _______ ．
options: B. operate the transponder on a code specified by the controller
C. operate the transponder on Mode A 7700 and Mode C altitude reporting
D. operate the transponder on Mode A 7600
answer: C. operate the transponder on Mode A 7700 and Mode C altitude reporting
explanation:
题干: 管制员可以指示遇险飞机的飞行员“大声喊救命”。如果是这种情况，飞行员应该_______ 。

选项:
A. 拨打求救电话
B. 根据控制器指定的代码操作应答器
C. 在模式 A 7700 和模式 C 高度报告上操作应答器
D. 在 A 模式下操作应答器 7600

stem: When an aircraft station fails to establish contact with the aeronautical station on the designated frequency, it shall _______ ．
options: A. attempt to establish contact on another frequency appropriate to the route
B. attempt to establish communication with other aircraft or other aeronautical stations on frequencies appropriate to the route
C. transmit its message twice on the designated frequencies, preceded by the phrase “Transmitting blind”
D. any one of the above procedures that is practicable
answer: D. any one of the above procedures that is practicable
explanation:
题干: 当航空器电台未能与指定频率上的航空电台建立联系时，应_______ ．

选项:
A. 尝试在适合该路线的另一个频率上建立联系
B. 尝试以适合航线的频率与其他飞机或其他航空电台建立通信
C. 在指定频率上发送两次消息，前面加上短语“盲发送”
D. 上述任何一项可行的程序

stem: The control unit established to provide Air Traffic Control Service to controlled flights arriving at, or departing from, one or more aerodromes, is _______.
explanation:
题干: 为向到达或离开一个或多个机场的受管制航班提供空中交通管制服务而设立的管制单位是_______。

选项:
A. TC 报告办公室
B. 机场管制办公室
C. 进近控制办公室
D. 区域管制办公室

stem: Which secondary radar code below is right?
explanation:
题干: 下面哪个二次雷达代码是正确的？

选项:
A. 第1309章
B.2537
C.8824
D.5690

stem: _______ is the airborne portion of the secondary surveillance radar system.
explanation:
题干: _______ 是二次监视雷达系统的机载部分。

选项:
A. 应答器
B. 审讯者
C. 解码器
D. 雷达示波器控制台

stem: The coded signal transmitted by the _______ mounted on the radar antenna, causes the aircraft transponder to reply automatically with a specific coded signal.
explanation:
题干: 安装在雷达天线上的_______发射的编码信号使飞机应答器自动回复特定的编码信号。

选项:
A. 解码器
B. 雷达示波器控制台
C. 询问者
D. 反射镜

stem: The “blips” of light on the radar screen are called raw radar _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 雷达屏幕上的光点称为原始雷达 _______ ．

选项:
A. 信号
B. 传输
C. 豆类
D. 退货

stem: A typical transponder has four windows which can be set to any number between _______ . This gives a total of 4,096 possible codes.
explanation:
题干: 典型的应答器有四个窗口，可以设置为 _______ 之间的任意数字。这总共给出了 4,096 个可能的代码。

选项:
A. 零和九
B. 零和八
C.零 和七
D. 一和九

stem: The controller will issue instructions using the phrase “_______” in cases where the Mode C altitude readout differs significantly from the altitude reported by the pilot.
explanation:
题干: 如果 C 模式高度读数与飞行员报告的高度显着不同，管制员将使用短语“_______”发出指令。

选项:
A.停 止尖叫
B. 停止高度嘎嘎声
C. 尖叫待机
D. 尖叫高度

stem: When the controller specifies “stop altitude squawk”, the pilot should respond by _______ ．
options: A. turning off Mode C altitude reporting
C. continuing to operate the transponder on Mode A
explanation:
题干: 当管制员指定“停止高度尖叫”时，飞行员应以 _______ 回应。

选项:
A. 关闭模式 C 高度报告
B. 关闭模式A
C. 继续以模式 A 操作应答器
D. A 和 B

stem: Aerodrome information should not be passed to aircraft _______ ．
options: D. during the last part of final approach
answer: D. during the last part of final approach
explanation:
题干: 机场信息不应传递给飞机 _______ ．

选项:
A. 启动前
B. 出租车前
C. 最后进近开始之前
D. 最后进近的最后部分

stem: Priority indicator QD in SITA represents_______.
explanation:
题干: SITA 中的优先级指标 QD 代表_______。

选项:
A. 苦恼
B. 紧迫性
C. 紧急情况
D. 常规消息

stem: The atmosphere contains approximately 78% of _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 大气中大约含有 78% 的 _______ 。

选项:
A. 氮气
B. 氧气
C. 氦气
D. 二氧化碳

stem: The approximate percentage of the oxygen content of the atmosphere is _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 大气中氧气含量的大约百分比是_______。

选项:
A.21
B.32
C.68
D.78

stem: The atmosphere is divided into layers according to the characteristics of each layer. The _______ is the one closest to the earth.
explanation:
题干: 根据各层的特征，将大气分为不同的层。 _______是离地球最近的一个。

选项:
A.热 层
B. 对流层
C.中 间层
D.平 流层

stem: The flight altitude for aircraft with no oxygen equipment or whose oxygen equipment is unserviceable should not exceed _______ meters.
explanation:
题干: 没有氧气设备或氧气设备无法使用的航空器的飞行高度不应超过_______米。

选项:
A.3600
B. 4000
C. 约4500℃
D.5000

stem: The major force that sets the atmosphere in motion comes from the _______ of the earth's surface.
options: C. circular motion of the air
explanation:
题干: 推动大气运动的主要力量来自地球表面的_______。

选项:
A. 大气环流
B. 对流过程
C. 空气的圆周运动
D. 加热不均匀

stem: The movement of the atmosphere set forth by the uneven heating of the earth’s surface is generally referred to as the atmospheric _______．
explanation:
题干: 由地球表面不均匀加热引起的大气运动通常称为大气_______。

选项:
A. 对流
B. 循环
C. 定罪
D. 对流运动

stem: The atmospheric circulation occurs through a process known as _______, which is defined as the circular motion that results when warm air rises and is replaced by cooler air.
explanation:
题干: 大气环流通过一个称为_______的过程发生，该过程被定义为当暖空气上升并被冷空气取代时产生的圆周运动。

选项:
A. 对流
B. 连接
C. 连接
D. 浓度

stem: The airway width in China is usually ______ km, and due to some constraints can be reduced to, but not less than ______ km.
explanation:
题干: 中国的航道宽度通常为______公里，由于某些限制可以减少到但不小于______公里。

选项:
A.20 10
B.20 8
C.15 10
D.10 8

stem: The primary cause of all changes in the Earth’s weather is _______ ．
options: A. variation of solar energy received by the Earth’s regions
B. changes in air pressure over the Earth’s surface
C. changes in air moisture content
D. movement of the air masses
answer: A. variation of solar energy received by the Earth’s regions
explanation:
题干: 地球天气所有变化的主要原因是_______。

选项:
A. 地球各区域接收到的太阳能的变化
B.地 球表面气压的变化
C.空 气湿度的变化
D. 气团的运动

stem: A characteristic of the stratosphere is _______ ．
options: A. visible moisture in the form of clouds and thunderstorms
B. an overall decrease of temperature with an increase in altitude
C. a relatively even base altitude of approximately 35,000ft
D. relatively small changes in temperature with an increase in altitude
answer: B. an overall decrease of temperature with an increase in altitude
explanation:
题干: 平流层的一个特征是 _______ ．

选项:
A. 云和雷暴形式的可见湿气
B.随 着海拔的升高，气温总体下降
C. 大约 35,000 英尺的相对均匀的基准高度
D.随 着海拔的升高，温度变化相对较小

stem: Uneven heating modifies air density and creates circulation patterns, resulting in changes in pressure. This is one of the main reasons for differences in _______ between weather reporting stations.
explanation:
题干: 不均匀的加热会改变空气密度并形成循环模式，从而导致压力变化。这是气象报告站之间 _______ 存在差异的主要原因之一。

选项:
A. 高度计读数
B. 高度计设置
C. 距离
D. 温度

stem: When an aircraft is flying _____, we call it super low-altitude flying.
options: A. less than 50m from ground or water surface
B. at 10m from ground or water surface or less
C. 5 to 100m from ground or water surface
D. less than 100m from ground or water surface
answer: D. less than 100m from ground or water surface
explanation:
题干: 当飞机在_____飞行时，我们称之为超低空飞行。

选项:
A.距 离地面或水面小于50m
B.距 地面或水面10m以下
C.距 地面或水面5～100m
D.距 离地面或水面小于100m

stem: The lines that connect points of equal temperature are called _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 连接温度相等的点的线称为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 等压线
B. 等温线
C. 等深线
D.等 角线

stem: The lines of equal wind velocity are called _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 等风速线称为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 等压线
B. 等温线
C. 等深线
D. isogonic lines

stem: The feature associated with the tropopause is _______ ．
options: A. absence of wind and turbulent conditions
B. absolute upper limit of cloud formation
C. abrupt change in temperature lapse rate
D. constant height above the Earth
answer: C. abrupt change in temperature lapse rate
explanation:
题干: 与对流层顶相关的特征是 _______ ．

选项:
A. 无风和湍流条件
B. 云形成的绝对上限
C.温 度递减率突变
D.距 地球高度恒定

stem: The resulting pattern of the isobars reveals the change in pressure over distance, which is normally called _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 由此产生的等压线模式揭示了压力随距离的变化，通常称为 _______ ．

选项:
A.压 力模式
B.压 力梯度
C.压 力递减率
D. 压力系统

stem: A _______ is a center of high pressure surrounded on all sides by lower pressure.
explanation:
题干: _______ 是一个高压中心，四周被低压包围。

选项:
A. 槽
B. 桥
C. 低
D. 高

stem: A _______ is an area of low pressure surrounded by higher pressure.
explanation:
题干: _______ 是被高压包围的低压区域。

选项:
A. 卷心菜
B. 桥
C. 低
D. 高

stem: A col is _______ ．
options: A. a neutral area between two highs
B. a neutral area between two lows
C. the intersection of a ridge and a trough
D. an area defined by any of the above
answer: D. an area defined by any of the above
explanation:
题干: 上校是 _______ ．

选项:
A. 两个高点之间的中性区域
B. 两个低点之间的中性区域
C. 山脊和海槽的交点
D. 由上述任何一项定义的区域

stem: A high or a _______ is generally associated with good visibility, calm or light winds, and few clouds.
explanation:
题干: 高度或_______通常与良好的能见度、平静或微风以及很少的云有关。

选项:
A. 低
B. 桥
C. 槽
D.上 校

stem: After the landing of the hijacked aircraft, controller should guide it to taxi to the position with a safe distance from_______ .
explanation:
题干: 被劫持航空器着陆后，管制员应引导其滑行至与________保持安全距离的位置。

选项:
A. 终端
B. 停机坪
C.燃 油储备
D. 以上所有

stem: _______ is a deflective force that is created by the difference in rotational velocity between the equator and the poles.
explanation:
题干: _______ 是由赤道和两极之间的旋转速度差产生的偏转力。

选项:
A. 摩擦力
B. 科里奥利
C. 重力
D. 压力梯度力

stem: Pressure gradient and _______ work in combination to create wind.
options: A. friction caused by earth’s surface
explanation:
题干: 压力梯度和_______共同作用产生风。

选项:
A.地 球表面产生的摩擦力
B. 科里奥利力
C. 地球引力
D. 大气环流

stem: _______ deflects the wind toward the right in the Northern Hemisphere.
options: D. Friction caused by the earth’s surface
explanation:
题干: 在北半球，_______ 使风向右偏转。

选项:
A. 重力
B. 科里奥利力
C. 压力梯度力
D.地 球表面引起的摩擦力

stem: _______ in the Northern Hemisphere flow clockwise around highs and counterclockwise around lows.
explanation:
题干: 北半球的_______在高点周围顺时针流动，在低点周围逆时针流动。

选项:
A. 风
B. 空气流通
C. 对流环流
D. 太阳辐射

stem: _______ is the changing of liquid water to invisible water vapor.
explanation:
题干: _______是液态水变成看不见的水蒸气。

选项:
A. 凝结
B. 蒸发
C. 升华
D. 熔化

stem: The reverse of evaporation is _______. It occurs when water vapor changes to a liquid, as when water drops form on a cool glass on a warm day.
explanation:
题干: 蒸发的逆过程是_______。当水蒸气变成液体时就会发生这种情况，就像在温暖的日子里在凉爽的玻璃上形成水滴一样。

选项:
A. 熔化
B. 升华
C. 凝结
D. 冷冻

stem: _______ is the changing of ice directly to water vapor, or of water vapor to ice.
explanation:
题干: _______是冰直接变成水蒸气，或水蒸气变成冰。

选项:
A. 升华
B. 凝结
C. 冷冻
D. 熔化

stem: The reverse process of freezing is _______. It is the change of ice to water.
explanation:
题干: 冻结的逆过程是_______。这是冰到水的变化。

选项:
A. 升华
B. 凝结
C. 冷冻
D. 熔化

stem: The wake separation criterion between the preceding medium aircraft and the light aircraft behind is_______.
explanation:
题干: 前面的中型飞机和后面的轻型飞机之间的尾流间隔标准是_______。

选项:
A.s hkm
B. 8公里
C. 10公里
D. 12公里

stem: The amount of moisture the air can hold depends on air temperature _______ is the temperature at which air becomes saturated.
explanation:
题干: 空气能容纳的湿气量取决于空气温度_______是空气饱和的温度。

选项:
A. 露点
B. 湿度
C. 水分
D. 相对湿度

stem: Clouds, fog, or dew always form when water vapor _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 云、雾或露水总是在水蒸气_______时形成。

选项:
A. 蒸发
B. 融化
C. 冻结
D. 凝结

stem: Water is present in the atmosphere in three states. Which word below is not used to define the states of water?
explanation:
题干: 水以三种状态存在于大气中。下面哪个词不是用来定义水的状态的？

选项:
A. 冰
B. 固体
C. 液体
D. 瓦斯

stem: Water vapor is added to the atmosphere by the process of _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 水蒸气通过______的过程被添加到大气中。

选项:
A. 蒸发
B. 凝结
C. 升华
D. A 或 C

stem: Water vapor is removed from the atmosphere by the process of _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 水蒸气通过______的过程从大气中除去。

选项:
A. 升华
B. 冷冻
C. 凝结
D. A 或 C

stem: Every physical process of weather is accompanied by or is the result of a _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 天气的每一个物理过程都伴随着_______，或者是_______的结果。

选项:
A. 热交换
B. 对流过程
C. 天气变化
D. 温度变化

stem: The presence of ice pellets at the surface is evidence that _______ ．
options: A. there are thunderstorms in the area
B. a cold front has passed
C. there is freezing rain at a higher altitude
D. the pilot can climb to a higher altitude without encountering more than light icing
answer: C. there is freezing rain at a higher altitude
explanation:
题干: 表面存在冰粒证明 _______ ．

选项:
A.该 地区有雷阵雨
B.冷 锋过去
C.高 海拔地区有冻雨
D. 飞行员可以爬升到更高的高度，而不会遇到超过轻微结冰的情况

stem: Drizzle, rain, snow, hail, ice pellets, and ice crystals are all forms of _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 毛毛雨、雨、雪、冰雹、冰粒和冰晶都是_______的形式。

选项:
A. 排汗
B. 降水
C.可 见水分
D. A 或 C

stem: Routine aviation weather report is _______ .
explanation:
题干: 常规航空天气预报是_______。

选项:
A. 航站天气预报
B.罗 福尔
C. 温度计
D. 我先生看了

stem: The conditions that will result in the formation of frost are _______ ．
options: A. the temperature of the collecting surface is at or below freezing and small droplets of moisture are falling
B. when dew forms and the temperature is below freezing
C. temperature of the collecting surface is below the dewpoint of surrounding air and the dewpoint is colder than freezing
D. small drops of moisture falling on the collecting surface when the surrounding air temperature is at or below freezing
answer: C. temperature of the collecting surface is below the dewpoint of surrounding air and the dewpoint is colder than freezing
explanation:
题干: 形成霜的条件是_______．

选项:
A.收 集表面的温度等于或低于冰点并且有小水滴落下
B. 当结露且温度低于冰点时
C.收 集面的温度低于周围空气的露点且露点低于冰点
D.当 周围空气温度等于或低于冰点时，小水滴落在收集表面上

stem: The low pressure area at the equator is caused by the _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 赤道低压区是由_______引起的。

选项:
A. 太阳
B. 月亮
C. 地球自转
D. 相对风

stem: Air tends to flow from a _______ pressure area to a _______ pressure.
explanation:
题干: 空气倾向于从_______压力区域流向_______压力区域。

选项:
A. 高、低
B. 低、高
C. 高，高
D. 低，低

stem: An elongated area of low pressure with the lowest pressure along a line is called a _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 沿一条线具有最低压力的细长低压区域称为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 高
B. 吹
C. 槽
D.山 脊

stem: An elongated area of high pressure with the highest pressure along a line is called a _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 沿一条线具有最高压力的细长高压区域称为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 高
B. 吹
C. 槽
D.山 脊

stem: In a low level inversion, as altitude increases, temperature _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 在低层逆温中，随着高度增加，温度 _______ ．

选项:
A. 保持不变
B.先 减少，后增加
C.减 少
D. 增加

stem: On the average, for every 1000 feet altitude increase, temperature will decrease approximately _______ ℃．
explanation:
题干: 平均而言，海拔每增加 1000 英尺，温度将降低约 _______ ℃。

选项:
A. 0.2
B.2
C.3.5
D.3

stem: The greatest instability of the atmosphere occurs when the air is both_______ . Tropical weather, with its almost daily thunderstorm activity, is a perfect example of this.
explanation:
题干: 当空气同时是______时，大气的最大不稳定性就会发生。几乎每天都有雷暴活动的热带天气就是一个完美的例子。

选项:
A. 温暖湿润
B. 阴凉干燥
C. 温暖干燥
D. 凉爽湿润

stem: The most frequent type of ground or surface-based temperature inversion is that produced by _______ ．
options: A. radiation on a clear, relatively still night
B. warm air being lifted rapidly aloft in the vicinity of mountainous terrain
C. the movement of colder air under warm air, or the movement of warm air over cold air
D. the widespread sinking of air within a thick layer aloft resulting in heating by com_x001f_pression
answer: A. radiation on a clear, relatively still night
explanation:
题干: 最常见的地面或地面逆温类型是由_______产生的。

选项:
A. 晴朗、相对安静的夜晚的辐射
B. 山区附近的暖空气迅速上升
C.冷 空气在暖空气下面的运动，或者暖空气在冷空气上面的运动
D. 高空厚层内的空气广泛下沉，导致 com_x001f_pression 加热

stem: The feature associated with a temperature inversion is _______ ．
options: A. an unstable layer of air
B. a stable layer of air
answer: B. a stable layer of air
explanation:
题干: 与逆温相关的特征是 _______ ．

选项:
A.不 稳定的空气层
B. 稳定的空气层
C.气 团雷暴
D. 晴空湍流

stem: The combined effects of _______ determine the stability of the air and, to a large extent, the type of weather produced.
explanation:
题干: _______ 的综合影响决定了空气的稳定性，并在很大程度上决定了所产生的天气类型。

选项:
A. 压力和温度
B. 湿度和温度
C.密 度和压力
D.水 分和密度

stem: With a standard surface temperature, estimate the temperature at 10,000ft to be _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 根据标准表面温度，估计 10,000 英尺处的温度为 _______ ．

选项:
A.5
B.1
C.-1
D.-5

stem: If the field elevation is 5,000ft, and the temperature is 14℃, at what altitude will the freezing level (0℃) be encountered?
explanation:
题干: 如果现场海拔为 5,000 英尺，温度为 14℃，那么在什么高度会遇到冰冻水平（0℃）？

选项:
A. 6,000 英尺 AGL
B. 8,000 英尺 AGL
C. 10,000 英尺 MSL
D.12，000 英尺 MSL

stem: _______ are said to be weather signposts in the sky. They provide a visible indication of the processes occurring in the atmosphere.
options: A. The wind and unstable air
explanation:
题干: 据说_______是天空中的天气路标。它们提供了大气中发生的过程的可见指示。

选项:
A. 风和不稳定的空气
B. 降水量和气温
C. 云
D. 雷暴

stem: The characteristics of stable air are _______ ．
options: A. good visibility, showery precipitation, cumulus clouds
B. good visibility, steady precipitation, stratus clouds
C. poor visibility, intermittent precipitation, cumulus clouds
D. poor visibility, steady precipitation, stratus clouds
answer: D. poor visibility, steady precipitation, stratus clouds
explanation:
题干: 稳定空气的特点是_______．

选项:
A. 能见度良好，阵雨，积云
B. 能见度好，降水稳定，层云
C.能 见度差，间歇性降水，积云
D. 能见度差，降水稳定，层云

stem: What is a characteristic of stable air?
options: D. Temperature decreases rapidly with altitude
explanation:
题干: 稳定空气有什么特点？

选项:
A. 层状云
B. 无限可见性
C. 天气晴朗的积云
D. 温度随海拔高度迅速降低

stem: Clouds, fog, or dew will always form when _______ ．
options: C. the temperature and dewpoint are equal
D. the temperature and dewpoint are not equal
explanation:
题干: 云、雾或露水总是会在_______时形成。

选项:
A.有 水蒸气存在
B. 水蒸气凝结
C.温 度和露点相等
D.温 度和露点不相等

stem: The general characteristics of unstable air are _______ ．
options: A. good visibility, showery precipitation, and cumuliform-type clouds
B. good visibility, steady precipitation, and stratiform-type clouds
C. poor visibility, intermittent precipitation, and cumuliform-type clouds
D. poor visibility, showery precipitation, and stratiform-type clouds
answer: A. good visibility, showery precipitation, and cumuliform-type clouds
explanation:
题干: 不稳定空气的一般特征是 _______ ．

选项:
A. 能见度好，阵雨，积状云
B. 能见度好，降水稳定，层状云
C. 能见度差、间歇性降水、积状云
D. 能见度差、阵雨、层状云

stem: On the high altitude weather chart, the temperature difference between isotherms is ______ degrees Celsius.
explanation:
题干: 在高海拔天气图上，等温线之间的温度差为______摄氏度。

选项:
A.4
B.5
C.8
D.9

stem: The four families of clouds are _______ ．
options: A. stratus, cumulus, nimbus, and cirrus
B. clouds formed by updrafts, fronts, cooling layers of air, and precipitation into warm air
C. high, middle, low, and those with extensive vertical development
D. altocumulus, nimbostratus, cirrus, and towering cumulus
answer: C. high, middle, low, and those with extensive vertical development
explanation:
题干: 四种云族是_______ ．

选项:
A. 层云、积云、雨云和卷云
B. 由上升气流、锋面、空气冷却层和暖空气降水形成的云
C.高、中、低以及垂直发展广泛的
D. 高积云、雨层云、卷云和高耸积云

stem: The suffix “nimbus”, used in naming clouds, means a _______ ．
options: A. cloud with extensive vertical development
B. layered clouds that form near the surface
explanation:
题干: 后缀“nimbus”用于命名云，意思是 _______ ．

选项:
A.垂 直方向广泛发展的云
B. 靠近地表形成的层状云
C. 雨云
D. 黑色、巨大、高耸的云

stem: The prefix “alto” is used to name cumulus and stratus clouds from the _______ family.
explanation:
题干: 前缀“alto”用于命名 _______ 族的积云和层云。

选项:
A. 低
B. 中
C. 高
D. A 或 B

stem: The prefix “cirro” is used to denote cumulus and stratus clouds from the _______ family.
explanation:
题干: 前缀“cirro”用于表示 _______ 族的积云和层云。

选项:
A. 低
B. 中
C. 高
D. A 或 C

stem: Clouds are classified into four families, based on their _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 云根据其 _______ 分为四个家族。

选项:
A. 特征和海拔高度
B. 形状和高度
C. 成分和形状
D. 厚度和成分

stem: The average height for 850hpa, 700hpa and 500hpa weather chart is_______respectively.
_______ are not included in low clouds.
explanation:
题干: _______ 不包括在低云中。

选项:
A. 积云和层云
B. 层积云和积云
C. 高积云和卷层云
D. 层云和卷云

stem: _______ is not an example of middle clouds.
explanation:
题干: _______ 不是中层云的例子。

选项:
A. 高积云
B. 高层云
C. 雨层云
D.卷 层云

stem: _______ does not belong to the high clouds.
explanation:
题干: _______不属于高云。

选项:
A. 层积云
B. 卷云
C. 卷积云
D.卷 层云

stem: _______ clouds are similar to cumulus clouds, except they have more vertical development.
explanation:
题干: _______云与积云相似，但它们具有更多的垂直发展。

选项:
A. 雨层云
B. 层积云
C. 高耸的积云
D.卷 层云

stem: _______ are found in altitudes associated with low, middle, and high clouds.
options: C. Layered clouds that form in stable air
D. Clouds with extensive vertical development
answer: D. Clouds with extensive vertical development
explanation:

stem: The term “embedded thunderstorms” indicates that _______ ．

B. thunderstorms are predicted to develop in a stable air mass
C. thunderstorms are obscured by massive cloud layers and cannot be seen
D. thunderstorms are seen to be developing rapidly
answer: C. thunderstorms are obscured by massive cloud layers and cannot be seen
explanation:
题干: “嵌入式雷暴”一词表明 _______ ．

选项:
A. 强烈雷暴嵌入飑线内
B. 预计雷暴将在稳定的气团中发展
C. 雷暴被大量云层遮蔽而看不见
D. 雷暴发展迅速

stem: _______ clouds indicate a fairly deep layer of unstable air. They contain moderate to heavy turbulence with icing and often develop into thunderstorms.
explanation:
题干: _______云表明有相当深的不稳定空气层。它们包含中度到重度的湍流并结冰，并且经常发展成雷暴。

选项:
A. 卷层云
B. 高层云
C. 高耸的积云
D.积 雨云

stem: Turbulence will occur when aircraft in flight encounter _______.
explanation:

选项:
A.前 端云系统
B.扰 乱气流
C. 地层云系统
D. 降水

stem: The _______ is a large body of air with fairly uniform temperature and moisture content.
explanation:
题干: _______是一个温度和湿度相当均匀的大空气体。

选项:
A. 云
B. 气团
C. 前面
D. 雷雨

stem: Fair weather cumulus clouds often indicate _______ ．
options: A. turbulence at and below the cloud level
answer: A. turbulence at and below the cloud level
explanation:
题干: 晴朗的天气积云通常表示 _______ ．

选项:
A. 云层及云层以下的湍流
B. 平稳飞行条件
C. 能见度差
D.结 冰和降水

stem: Low clouds usually consist almost entirely of _______ ．
explanation:

选项:
A. 冰晶
B. 水
C. 氦气
D. 二氧化碳

stem: A high cloud is composed mostly of _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 高云主要由 _______ 组成。

选项:
A. 冰晶
B. 水
C. 过冷水
D. 氦气

stem: An air mass is a body of air that _______ ．
options: A. has similar cloud formations associated with it
C. creates a wind shift as it moves across the surface
D. covers an extensive area and has fairly uniform properties of temperature and moisture
answer: D. covers an extensive area and has fairly uniform properties of temperature and moisture
explanation:

选项:

B.具 有相似的云形状

D.覆 盖范围广，温湿度特性相当均匀

stem: The boundary between airmasses is called a _______ ．
explanation:

选项:
A.山 脊
B. 飑线
C. 前面
D. 槽

explanation:

选项:

B. 湿度和温度
C. 温度和压力
D. 压力和形成

stem: _______ cannot be an indication to the passage of a frontal system.
options: A. A change in wind direction or speed
explanation:

选项:
A. 风向或风速的变化
B. 温度变化
C. 压力变化
D. 云的位置

stem: A cold front is one where _______ ．
options: A. cold air is replaced by warmer air
B. cold air is moving to replace warm air
C. the temperature is below freezing
D. the temperature and pressure are both very low
answer: B. cold air is moving to replace warm air
explanation:
题干: 冷锋是 _______ ．

选项:
A. 冷空气被暖空气取代
B. 冷空气正在取代暖空气

D.温 度和压力都很低

stem: A warm front is one where _______ ．
options: A. warm air is replaced by colder air
B. warm air is moving to replace cold air
C. the temperature is relatively high
D. the temperature and pressure are both very high
answer: B. warm air is moving to replace cold air
explanation:
题干: 暖锋是_______．

选项:
A. 暖空气被冷空气取代
B. 暖空气正在取代冷空气
C.温 度比较高
D.温 度和压力都很高

stem: When flight speed is constant, the greater the air density,
options: C. the less the thrust required
D. the less the engine output power
explanation:
题干: 当飞行速度一定时，空气密度越大，

选项:
A.升 力越大
B. 升力越小
C.所 需推力越小
D.发 动机输出功率越小

stem: Which of the following is not a general weather characteristic associated with cold fronts?
options: B. Turbulence and strong gusty winds
D. Clearing skies and good visibility behind the front passage
explanation:
题干: 以下哪项不是与冷锋相关的一般天气特征？

选项:
A. 积云
B. 湍流和强阵风
C. 降水稳定
D. 前方通道后方天空晴朗，能见度良好

stem: Airmasses are classified according to the regions where they originate. They are generally divided into polar or tropical to identify _______ characteristics.
explanation:
题干: 气团根据其起源区域进行分类。它们通常分为极地或热带，以识别 ________ 特征。

选项:

B. 密度
C. 温度
D. 起源

stem: When the temperature rises, first of all,
explanation:
题干: 当气温升高时，首先，

选项:
A.相 对湿度增加
B.相 对湿度降低
C.水 蒸气含量增加
D.水 蒸气含量减少

stem: _______ would decrease the stability of an air mass.
options: D. Sinking of the air mass
explanation:

选项:
A. 自下而上变暖
B. 从下方冷却
C.水 蒸气减少
D. 气团下沉

stem: An area of severe weather often forms well _______ the fast-moving cold front.

选项:

B. 领先于

D. 以上

C. Growth rate of cloud is maximum
D. Strong turbulence in the cloud

选项:
A. 高耸的积云
B. 积雨云
C. 高积云
D. 雨层云

options: D. Clouds with extensive vertical development
explanation:
题干: _______ 最不可能导致飞机结构结冰。

选项:
A. 低云
B. 中云
C. 高云
D. 垂直发展广泛的云

stem: In TAF, BR stands for _______ .
explanation:
题干: 在 航站天气预报 中，BR 代表 _______ 。

选项:

B. 雾霾
C. 雾气
D. 毛毛雨

options: B. in a cold air mass
C. ahead of a cold front
answer: C. ahead of a cold front
explanation:

选项:
A.在 封闭的前沿

题干: _______是一种总是与雷暴有关的天气现象。

选项:
A. 闪电
B. 大阵雨
C. 过冷雨滴
D.冰 雹

题干: 当两个气团的压力大致相等时，就会产生______。

stem: If an airmass forms over water, its classification is _______ ．

题干: 如果气团在水面上形成，它的分类是_______。

选项:
A. 海事
B. 热带
C.极 地
D. 欧陆式

stem: The tendency of an airmass to resist vertical motion is called _______ ．

题干: 气团抵抗垂直运动的趋势称为 _______ ．

题干: 当气团从下面变暖时，它的稳定性是_______。

D. 发达

stem: Most clouds are composed of minute _______ droplets.
explanation:
题干: 大多数云是由微小的_______水滴组成。

选项:
A. 冰
B. 灰尘
C. 水
D. 抽烟

stem: An altostratus cloud is classified in the _______ cloud group.
explanation:
题干: 高层云属于_______云组。

选项:
A. 低
B. 中
C. 高
D. A 或 C

stem: The transition zone where two different airmasses meet is called a _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 两个不同气团相遇的过渡区称为 _______ 。

选项:
A. 飑线
B. 桥
C. 前面
D. 屏障

stem: _______ is the most easily recognized discontinuity across a front.
explanation:
题干: _______ 是正面最容易识别的不连续性。

选项:
A. 温度
B. 水分
C. 压力
D. 风

stem: _______ generally produces the most violent flying weather.
explanation:
题干: _______ 通常会产生最猛烈的飞行天气。

选项:
A. 暖锋
B. 冷锋
C. 快速移动的冷锋
D. 固定锋

stem: _______ cloud is associated with fast-moving cold fronts.
explanation:
题干: _______云与快速移动的冷锋有关。

选项:
A.卷 云
B. 高层云
C. 高积云
D.积 雨云

stem: The cumulus stage of the thunderstorm is marked by _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 雷暴的积云阶段以______为标志。

选项:
A. 下沉气流
B. 脑
C. 冰雹
D. 上升气流

stem: _______ are associated with the mature stage of the thunderstorm.
explanation:
题干: _______与雷暴的成熟阶段有关。

选项:
A. 上升气流
B. 下沉气流
C. 飑线
D. A 和 B

stem: _______ stage of a thunderstorm might be considered the most violent.
explanation:
题干: 雷暴的_______阶段可能被认为是最猛烈的。

选项:
A. 积云
B. 成熟
C. 消散
D. A 或 B

stem: _______ is the most dangerous type of structural icing.
explanation:
题干: _______ 是最危险的结构结冰类型。

选项:
A. 押韵
B. 清除冰块
C. 弗罗斯特
D. 中等雾凇

stem: _______ are necessary for a substantial buildup of ice on an aircraft.
options: A. Visible moisture and water temperature at or below 0℃
B. Visible moisture and temperature of the aircraft at or below 0℃
C. Supercooled water and cold front
explanation:
题干: _______对于飞机上大量结冰是必要的。

选项:
A. 可见湿度及水温0℃以下
B. 飞机可见湿度和温度0℃及以下
C.过 冷水和冷锋
D. A 或 B

stem: Pitot tube icing affects _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 皮托管结冰影响______。

选项:
A. 空速指示器
B. 轮流协调员
C. 态度指示器
D.垂 直速度指示器

stem: Clear icing would likely be found in _______ clouds.
explanation:
题干: _______云中可能会发现清晰的结冰。

选项:
A. 层云
B.卷 云
C.积 云
D. 高层云杉

stem: Clear ice is more dangerous than rime ice because it _______ ．
options: A. forms quickly and adheres firmly
B. adds weight to the tail section
C. forms slowly but extends well into the airstream
D. forms on the lower side of the wing, out of sight
answer: A. forms quickly and adheres firmly
explanation:
题干: 透明的冰比雾凇更危险，因为它 _______ ．

选项:
A. 形成迅速且粘附牢固
B. 增加尾部重量
C.形 成缓慢但很好地延伸到气流中
D. 形成于机翼下侧，看不见

stem: Rime ice usually is associated with _______ cloud.
explanation:
题干: 雾凇冰通常与_______云有关。

选项:
A. 高积云
B. 碎积云
C. 积雨云
D. 层云

stem: When haze and smoke occur together with fog and stratus, the combination is called _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 当霾和烟与雾和层云一起出现时，这种组合称为 _______ 。

选项:
A. 雾霾
B. 吸烟
C. 将
D. 烟雾

stem: _______ fog is widely known as “ground fog”.
explanation:
题干: _______雾被广泛称为“地面雾”。

选项:
A. 感染
B. 辐射
C. 平流
D. 蒸汽

stem: Airborne weather radar is designed for _______ severe weather.
explanation:
题干: 机载气象雷达专为_______恶劣天气而设计。

选项:
A. 检测和避免
B. 定位和穿透
C. 去除
D. 确保避免

stem: The wind that changes direction sharply either horizontally or vertically is called a _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 水平或垂直方向急剧改变的风称为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 涡流
B. 对流
C.风 切变
D.逆 温

stem: When the pilot unintentionally flies through turbulence, it is important to _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 当飞行员无意中飞过湍流时，重要的是_______ ．

选项:
A. 保持高度
B. 降低速度
C. 保持航向
D. 控制转速

stem: When air comes down along leeward hillside, the air will get_______.

题干: 当空气沿着背风山坡下降时，空气会变得_______。

选项:

D. 潮湿、寒冷

stem: A pilot reporting turbulence that momentarily causes slight, erratic changes in altitude and/or attitude should report it as _______ ．

题干: 飞行员报告短暂导致高度和/或姿态轻微、不稳定变化的湍流时，应将其报告为 _______ 。

选项:
A. 光湍流
B. 中度湍流
C. 轻斩

stem: Hazardous wind shear is commonly encountered near the ground _______ ．

C. during periods of the frontal inversion, and near the jet stream
explanation:
题干: 危险的风切变常见于地面______。

选项:
A.层 积云周围
B. 强烈逆温期间和雷暴附近
C. 锋面逆温期间和急流附近
D. B 或 C

stem: _______ is a sudden, drastic shift in wind speed and/or direction that may occur at any altitude in a vertical or horizontal plane.
explanation:
题干: _______ 是风速和/或风向的突然、剧烈变化，可能发生在垂直或水平面的任何高度。

选项:
A. 风切变
B. 尾流湍流
C. 急流
D. 龙卷风

stem: When landing behind a large jet aircraft, the pilot is expected to _______ to avoid wake turbulence.
options: A. land at least 1,000ft beyond the jet’s touchdown point
B. stay above the jet’s glide path
C. touchdown beyond the jet’s touchdown point
explanation:
题干: 当在大型喷气式飞机后面着陆时，飞行员应该_______以避免尾流湍流。

选项:
A. 在距飞机着陆点至少 1,000 英尺处着陆
B. 停留在飞机滑翔路径上方
C. 超出飞机着陆点的着陆
D. B 和 C

stem: The wake turbulence avoidance procedure for landing after large jet takes off is to _______ ．
options: A. stay below normal glide path
B. stay above normal glide path
C. touch down well before the jet’s lift off point
answer: C. touch down well before the jet’s lift off point
explanation:
题干: 大型喷气式飞机起飞后着陆的尾流湍流避免程序是 _______ ．

选项:
A. 保持在正常滑行路径以下
B. 保持在正常滑行路径之上
C. 在飞机起飞点之前着陆
D. B 和 C

stem: When taking off after a large jet lands, the pilot is expected to lift off _______ to avoid possible wake turbulence.
options: A. beyond the jet’s touchdown point
B. before the jet’s touchdown point
C. 1,000ft beyond the jet’s touchdown point
answer: A. beyond the jet’s touchdown point
explanation:
题干: 大型喷气式飞机着陆后起飞时，飞行员应升空_______以避免可能的尾流湍流。

选项:
A. 超出飞机的着陆点
B. 飞机着陆点之前
C. 距离飞机着陆点 1,000 英尺
D. A 或 B

stem: When taking off after a large jet takes off, the pilot is expected to _______ ．
options: A. lift off before the jet’s rotation point
B. lift off beyond the jet’s rotation point
C. climb out above the jet’s flight path
explanation:
题干: 大型喷气式飞机起飞后起飞时，飞行员应______。

选项:
A. 在喷气机旋转点之前升空
B. 升空超过喷气机的旋转点
C. 爬出喷气式飞机的飞行路径上方
D. A 和 C

stem: When encountering icing in stratiform clouds, the pilot can expect to _______ ．
options: A. climb or descend out of the visible moisture
B. climb or descend to an altitude where the temperature is above freezing
C. change to an altitude where the temperature is lower than –10℃
explanation:
题干: 当遇到层状云结冰时，飞行员可以预期 _______ 。

选项:
A.从 可见的湿气中爬升或下降
B. 爬升或下降到温度高于冰点的高度
C.改 变海拔高度低于–10℃
D. 以上所有

stem: If encountering cumuliform clouds and suspecting icing conditions, the best action by the pilot would be _______ ．
options: C. descending to a lower altitude to avoid icing
explanation:
题干: 如果遇到积状云并怀疑有结冰情况，飞行员的最佳行动是_______。

选项:
A.飞 越发达的云层
B. 改变路线
C.下 降到较低高度以避免结冰
D. B 或 C

stem: In weather forecasts or pilot reports, aircraft structural icing is normally classified as _______ ．
options: C. low, moderate, strong, and severe
D. trace, light, moderate, and severe
answer: D. trace, light, moderate, and severe
explanation:
题干: 在天气预报或飞行员报告中，飞机结构结冰通常被分类为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 低、中、高
B. 轻、中、重
C.低、中、强、重度
D. 轻微、轻度、中度、重度

stem: The greatest wake turbulence danger is produced by large aircraft operating at _______ ．
options: A. low speeds and high angles of attack
B. high speeds and low angles of attack
C. low altitudes and high speeds
D. high altitudes and low speeds
answer: A. low speeds and high angles of attack
explanation:
题干: 最大的尾流湍流危险是由在 _______ 运行的大型飞机产生的。

选项:
A.低 速大攻角
B.高 速度和小攻角
C.低 高度和高速度
D.高 海拔低速

stem: Wingtip vortices created by large aircraft tend to _______ ．
options: A. sink below the aircraft generating the turbulence
B. rise into the traffic pattern
C. rise into the takeoff or landing path of a crossing runway
D. accumulate at the beginning of the takeoff roll
answer: A. sink below the aircraft generating the turbulence
explanation:
题干: 大型飞机产生的翼尖涡流倾向于 _______ ．

选项:
A. 下沉到飞机下方，产生湍流
B. 进入流量模式
C. 上升到交叉跑道的起飞或着陆路径
D. 在起飞滑跑开始时积累

stem: Of the various aircraft icing, the one that has the greatest impact on flight is _______.
explanation:
题干: 在各种飞机结冰中，对飞行影响最大的是_______。

选项:
A. 雾凇和霜冻
B. 霜冻
C.押 韵
D. 透明冰

stem: When penetrating turbulent air, the pilot is expected to _______ ．
options: A. set power for maneuvering speed and maintain constant airspeed with pitch control
B. set power for maneuvering speed and maintain a level flight attitude
C. reduce airspeed to maneuvering speed and maintain altitude
D. reduce airspeed to never-exceed speed and maintain this speed
answer: B. set power for maneuvering speed and maintain a level flight attitude
explanation:
题干: 当穿越湍流空气时，飞行员应该 _______ ．

选项:
A. 设置机动速度功率并通过俯仰控制保持恒定空速
B.设 定机动速度功率并保持水平飞行姿态
C. 降低空速至机动速度并保持高度
D. 降低空速至不超过的速度并保持该速度

stem: _______ warn of weather hazards which mainly concern light aircraft.
explanation:
题干: _______ 警告主要涉及轻型飞机的天气灾害。

选项:
A. IR气象服务
B. 重要气象情报
C. 对流 重要气象情报
D. A 和 B

stem: SIGMETS are issued as a warning of weather conditions potentially hazardous _______ ．
options: C. only to light aircraft operations
explanation:
题干: 重要气象情报S 是作为潜在危险天气状况的警告而发出的 _______ ．

选项:
A. 特别是轻型飞机
B. 所有飞机
C. 仅限轻型飞机运行
D.主 要针对大型飞机

stem: When temperature rises, the takeoff weight and rolling distance will _______ respectively.
explanation:
题干: 当温度升高时，起飞重量和滑跑距离将分别______。

选项:
A.减 少和缩短
B. 减少和延长
C.增 加和延长
D.增 加和缩短

stem: _______ is not included in a convective SIGMET.
explanation:
题干: _______ 不包含在对流 重要气象情报 中。

选项:
A. 适度结冰
B. 低空风切变
C. 雷暴
D. 龙卷风

stem: A ceiling is defined as the height of the _______ ．
options: A. highest layer of clouds or obscuring phenomena aloft that covers over 6/10 of the sky
B. lowest layer of clouds that contributes to the overall overcast
C. lowest layer of clouds or obscuring phenomena aloft that is reported as broken or overcast
answer: C. lowest layer of clouds or obscuring phenomena aloft that is reported as broken or overcast
explanation:
题干: 天花板定义为 _______ 的高度。

选项:
A. 覆盖天空 6/10 以上的最高云层或高空模糊现象
B. 造成整体阴天的最低云层
C. 最低层云层或高空模糊现象，据报告为破碎或阴天
D. B 或 C

stem: _______ are used for winds aloft forecasts.
explanation:
题干: _______ 用于高空风预报。

选项:
A. 磁方向和结
B. 磁力方向和 MPH
C. 真实方向和节点
D. 真实方向和 MPH

stem: The radar summary chart is unique because it shows _______ ．
options: A. lines and cells of hazardous thunderstorms
B. types of precipitation between reporting stations
D. areas of icing levels within the clouds
answer: A. lines and cells of hazardous thunderstorms
explanation:
题干: 雷达摘要图是独一无二的，因为它显示 _______ ．

选项:
A. 危险雷暴的线和单元
B. 报告站之间的降水类型
C. 云层覆盖区域
D. 云层内的结冰区域

stem: A jetstream is defined as wind of _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 急流被定义为_______的风．

选项:
A. 30 节或更高
B. 40 节或以上
C. 50节或以上
D. 60 节或以上

stem: The strength and location of the jet stream is normally _______ ．
options: A. stronger and farther north in the winter
B. weaker and farther north in the summer
C. stronger and farther north in the summer
D. weaker and farther south in the winter
answer: B. weaker and farther north in the summer
explanation:
题干: 急流的强度和位置通常是_______．

选项:
A.冬 季更强、更北
B. 夏季天气较弱且偏北
C.夏 季更强、更北
D. 冬季较弱且更偏南

stem: PIREPs are pilot reports of current _______ ．
explanation:
题干: PIREP 是当前 _______ 的试点报告。

选项:
A. 航班状态
B. 位置
C. 天气情况
D. B 和 C

stem: If frost is not removed from the wings before flight, it may cause _______ ．
options: B. decrease in lift and increase in drag
C. a stall at a lower-than-normal angle of attack
explanation:
题干: 如果在飞行前没有清除机翼上的霜，可能会导致______。

选项:
A.早 期气流分离
B.升 力减小，阻力增大
C. 低于正常迎角的失速
D. 以上所有

stem: Hydroplaning is not likely to occur at high speeds on _______ runways.
explanation:
题干: 在 _______ 跑道上高速行驶时不太可能发生打滑现象。

选项:
A. 湿的
B. 郁郁葱葱
C. 积雪覆盖
D. 干燥

stem: Industrial areas typically produce more fog since they _______ ．
options: D. are full of water vapor
explanation:
题干: 工业区通常会产生更多的雾，因为它们_______ ．

选项:
A.有 较多的凝聚核
B. 含有较多的水分
C.具 有较高的温度
D.充 满水蒸气

stem: The number on the runway is given in relation to _______．
explanation:
题干: 跑道上的数字与_______有关。

选项:
A. 盛行风向
B. 磁北
C. 飞机航向
D. 正北

stem: Which of the following statement is not true?
options: A. Wind directly affects airplanes during takeoffs and landings
B. Runways are arbitrarily placed by builders
C. Runway numbers are not arbitrarily placed on the runway
D. If there is only one runway at an airport, the runway is placed in alignment with the prevailing wind direction
answer: B. Runways are arbitrarily placed by builders
explanation:
题干: 以下哪项陈述是不正确的？

选项:
A. 风直接影响飞机起飞和降落
B. 跑道是建筑商任意布置的
C. 跑道号码不是随意放置在跑道上的
D. 如果机场只有一条跑道，则跑道应与盛行风向对齐

stem: The runway number of a runway with a magnetic heading of 083° is _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 磁航向为 083° 的跑道的跑道号是 _______ ．

选项:
A.83
B.8
C.8.3
D.9

stem: The numbers 09 and 27 on a runway may indicate that the runway is oriented approximately _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 跑道上的数字 09 和 27 可能表明跑道的方向约为 _______ 。

选项:
A. 009° and 027° true
B. 090° 和 270° 正确
C. 009° 和 027° 磁
D. 090°和270°磁性

stem: A runway labeled “15R” on one end is labeled _______ on the opposite end.
explanation:
题干: 跑道一端标有“15R”，另一端标有 _______。

选项:
A. 也许
B. 51L
C. 萨尔
D.51R

stem: Airports without control towers are referred to as _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 没有控制塔台的机场称为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 管制机场
B. 军用机场
C. 不受管制的机场
D. 训练机场

stem: If an altimeter setting is not available before flight, the pilot should adjust the altimeter to _______ ．
options: A. the elevation of the nearest airport corrected to mean sea level
B. the local current altimeter setting
C. the elevation of the departure area
D. pressure altitude corrected for nonstandard temperature
answer: C. the elevation of the departure area
explanation:
题干: 如果飞行前无法设置高度计，飞行员应将高度计调整至 _______ ．

选项:
A.最 近机场的海拔校正为平均海平面
B.本 地当前高度计设置
C.出 发区标高
D. 针对非标准温度校正的压力高度

stem: The runway number of a runway with a magnetic heading of 258° is _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 磁航向为 258° 的跑道的跑道号是 _______ ．

选项:
A.258
B. 58
C.26
D.25

stem: Any runway that is between the magnetic headings of _______ is designated with a single-digit runway number.
explanation:
题干: _______ 磁航向之间的任何跑道均指定有一位数的跑道号码。

选项:
A. 10°和90°
B. 0°and 180°
C.180°和360°
D. 0°和360°

stem: Runway 09 can be a runway with a magnetic heading between _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 09 号跑道可以是磁航向在 _______ 之间的跑道。

选项:
A.0°和9°
B. 10°和90°
C.80°和90°
D. 85° 和 94°

stem: Runway 26 can be a runway with a magnetic heading between _______ ．
The minimum safety altitude over a congested area is based on _______ ．
options: B. altitude above mean sea level
explanation:
题干: 拥挤区域上空的最低安全高度基于_______ ．

选项:
A. 越障
B. 平均海平面以上海拔高度
C.距 地面的高度
D. 以上都不是

stem: The official airport elevation is the highest part of the usable _______ measured in feet above mean sea level.
explanation:
题干: 官方机场海拔是可用_______的最高部分，以高于平均海平面的英尺为单位测量。

选项:
A. 机场
B. 跑道
C. 停机坪
D. 滑行道

stem: The link between the airport parking areas and the runways are the _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 机场停车区和跑道之间的联系是_______ ．

选项:
A. 桥梁
B. 滑行道
C. 航空公司
D. 行车路线

stem: When assigning runways for takeoffs and landings, air traffic controllers will refer to runways numbered “36L, 36C, 36R” as “_______”.
options: A. three six Lima, three six Charlie, three six Romeo
B. three six Left, three six Center, three six Right
C. three six Left, three six Charlie, three six Right
answer: B. three six Left, three six Center, three six Right
explanation:
题干: 在分配起飞和降落跑道时，空中交通管制员会将编号为“36L、36C、36R”的跑道称为“_______”。

选项:
A.三 六利马、三六查理、三六罗密欧
B.三 六左、三六中、三六右
C. 左三六，查理三六，右三六
D. 以上都不是

stem: Holding position markings may be painted wherever _______ intersect.
explanation:
题干: 等待位置标记可以画在 _______ 相交的任何地方。

选项:
A. 跑道和停车区
B. 跑道和停机坪
C. 滑行道和停车场
D. 滑行道和跑道

stem: Hold lines can keep the airplane clear of the _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 等待线可以让飞机远离_______ ．

选项:
A. 正在使用的跑道
B. 可用滑行道
C. 停车区
D.位 移阈值

stem: At a controlled airport, the controller asks the pilot to “hold short of the runway”. The controller means that the pilot should not _______ ．
options: B. stop before the hold lines
C. cross the hold lines after cleared
D. cross the hold lines after checking for traffic
explanation:
题干: 在受管制的机场，管制员要求飞行员“远离跑道”。管制员的意思是飞行员不应该 _______ ．

选项:
A. 清除之前继续
B. 在等待线前停车
C. 清除后越过等待线
D. 检查交通后穿过等待线

stem: When ILS approaches are in progress, the controller may ask the pilot to “hold short of the ILS critical area”. This does not imply that _______ ．
options: A. the runway in use is equipped with ILS
B. the ILS signals might be interfered if the airplane proceeds beyond the ILS hold lines
C. the ILS for the runway in use is out of service
D. there may be another aircraft making an ILS approach
answer: C. the ILS for the runway in use is out of service
explanation:
题干: 当 仪表着陆系统 进近正在进行时，管制员可能会要求飞行员“保持靠近 仪表着陆系统 关键区域”。这并不意味着 _______ ．

选项:
A.正 在使用的跑道配备了仪表着陆系统
B. 如果飞机超出 仪表着陆系统 等待线，仪表着陆系统 信号可能会受到干扰
C. 正在使用的跑道的 仪表着陆系统 停止服务
D. 可能有另一架飞机进行 仪表着陆系统 进近

stem: Instrument approaches using the vertical guidance to the landing runway are called _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 使用垂直引导着陆跑道的仪表进场称为 _______ ．

选项:
A. 视觉进近
B. 非精密进近
C. 精确进场
D. 直接进场

stem: Which runway marking may not be seen on a non-precision runway?
options: D. Fixed distance marking and side stripes
explanation:
题干: 哪些跑道标志在非精密跑道上看不到？

选项:
A. 白色虚线中心线
B. 阈值标记
C. 达阵区标记
D. 固定距离标记和侧条纹

stem: The _______ section of the turbofan engine supplies compressed air to the A/C.
explanation:
题干: 涡轮风扇发动机的______部分向空调提供压缩空气。

选项:
A. 排气
B. 进气
C. 燃烧
D. 压缩机

stem: If a displaced threshold marking is seen on a runway, which of the following is not true?
options: A. There may be an obstruction off the end of the runway
B. The pilot can make a normal descent and landing on the beginning portion of the pavement
C. The first few hundred feet of pavement may not be used for landing
D. The first few hundred feet of pavement should be suitable for taxiing and takeoffs
answer: B. The pilot can make a normal descent and landing on the beginning portion of the pavement
explanation:
题干: 如果在跑道上看到移位的阈值标记，以下哪一项是不正确的？

选项:
A. 跑道末端可能有障碍物
B. 飞行员可以正常下降并降落在路面的起始部分
C. 最初的几百英尺路面不得用于着陆
D. 前几百英尺的路面应适合滑行和起飞

stem: Which statement below is not true?
options: A. A stopway cannot be used for either takeoffs or landings
B. The stopway area is strong enough for an aborted takeoff to be made
C. The pavement strength of the stopway area may be able to support the weight of an airplane
D. The stopway area is strong enough for any operations
answer: D. The stopway area is strong enough for any operations
explanation:
题干: 下面哪个说法是不正确的？

选项:
A. 停止道不能用于起飞或着陆
B. 停止道区域的强度足以导致起飞中止
C. 停止道区域的路面强度可能能够支撑飞机的重量
D. 停车道区域足够坚固，可以进行任何操作

stem: The area preceding a displaced threshold cannot be used for _______ ．
explanation:
题干: 移位阈值之前的区域不能用于 _______ ．

选项:
A. 滑行
B. 登陆
C. 起飞
D. 起飞中止

stem: Large “Xs” painted on runways indicate that _______ ．
options: A. the runways may be used for landings only
B. the runways may be used for takeoffs only
C. the runways may be used for neither takeoffs nor landings
D. the runways may be used for aborted takeoffs
answer: C. the runways may be used for neither takeoffs nor landings
explanation:
题干: 跑道上画的大“X”表示______。

选项:
A. 跑道只能用于着陆
B. 跑道只能用于起飞
C. 跑道既不能用于起飞也不能用于着陆
D. 跑道可用于中止起飞

stem: Large “Xs” on taxiways indicate that _______ ．
options: A. the taxiways are newly marked
B. the taxiways cannot be used safely for normal operations
C. the taxiways will soon be available
D. the taxiways are under construction and will soon be available
answer: B. the taxiways cannot be used safely for normal operations
explanation:
题干: 滑行道上的大“X”表示______。

选项:
A. 滑行道是新标记的
B. 滑行道无法安全用于正常运营
C. 滑行道很快就会投入使用
D. 滑行道正在建设中，很快就会投入使用

stem: Airport lighting system should be opened twenty minutes before the aircraft is expected to _______ ．

answer: D. upwind light bar, middle light bar, downwind light bar
